it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.boardMessaes
 
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.drawOneMoreCard
 
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages
 
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.marketMessages
 
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.playerMessage
 
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI
    Class
    Description
    BuildingDTO
    DTO for a BuildingCard, carrying the building ID, food cost, end-game prestige points, and trigger event type.
    CardDTO
    DTO for a Mesos card, carrying the type, era, and any role-specific attributes (invention icon, shaman star, food discount, prestige points, hunter icon flag).
    OffertileDTO
    Data-transfer object for an offer tile, carrying the tile's letter ID and the number of top/bottom draws available on it.
    PlayerDTO
    Data-transfer object for a Mesos player, carrying the nickname, food total, prestige-point total, totem color, and the list of tribe cards.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.Controllers
    Class
    Description
    BuildingDTO
    DTO for a BuildingCard, carrying the building ID, food cost, end-game prestige points, and trigger event type.
    CardDTO
    DTO for a Mesos card, carrying the type, era, and any role-specific attributes (invention icon, shaman star, food discount, prestige points, hunter icon flag).
    OffertileDTO
    Data-transfer object for an offer tile, carrying the tile's letter ID and the number of top/bottom draws available on it.
    PlayerDTO
    Data-transfer object for a Mesos player, carrying the nickname, food total, prestige-point total, totem color, and the list of tribe cards.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI
    Class
    Description
    PlayerDTO
    Data-transfer object for a Mesos player, carrying the nickname, food total, prestige-point total, totem color, and the list of tribe cards.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI
    Class
    Description
    ActionDTO
    DTO carrying the number of top-row and bottom-row draws available to the current player on their chosen offer tile.
    BuildingDTO
    DTO for a BuildingCard, carrying the building ID, food cost, end-game prestige points, and trigger event type.
    CardDTO
    DTO for a Mesos card, carrying the type, era, and any role-specific attributes (invention icon, shaman star, food discount, prestige points, hunter icon flag).
    DefaultTileDTO
    Data-transfer object for a default tile, carrying the food-per-slot-position value used to compute food rewards when players stand on the tile at end of round.
    OffertileDTO
    Data-transfer object for an offer tile, carrying the tile's letter ID and the number of top/bottom draws available on it.
    PlayerDTO
    Data-transfer object for a Mesos player, carrying the nickname, food total, prestige-point total, totem color, and the list of tribe cards.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket
    Class
    Description
    PlayerDTO
    Data-transfer object for a Mesos player, carrying the nickname, food total, prestige-point total, totem color, and the list of tribe cards.
